title: Revocation Entry
description: One row in the maintainer-signed revocation registry. Identifies a pack by `contentHash`, names the reason it was revoked, and records when. Replays referencing a revoked pack remain playable in a `revoked content present` mode (see `docs/architecture/revocation.md`), so old replays do not silently break.

contentHash.description: Hex digest of the canonical pack contents — same field shape as `manifest.contentHash`.

reasonCode.description: Stable namespaced reason id, e.g. `revocation.ip.likeness` or `revocation.safety.nsfw`.

revokedAt.description: ISO-8601 timestamp at which the entry was added to the registry.
